---
title: "Session 3: Class Exercises"
Date: "Jan 9, 2026"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth (22294)"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

## Exercise 1: Different arithmetic operations

```{r}
# Basic Arithmetic 

x <- 50
y <- 15
z <- 20

# Addition
 x+y
 
 # Subtraction
 x-y
 
 # Multiplication
 
x*y

# Division

x/y

# Modulus

x%%y

# Power
x^y

# Integer Division
x %/% y



```


## Exercise 2: Vectors

```{r}
heights <- c(150, 160, 170, 165, 160, 160)
heights[1]
heights[-1]
heights[1:2]

mean (heights)
sd (heights)
median (heights)

str(heights)
```

## Exercise 3: Data Frames

```{r}
students <- data.frame (
  name = c("A","B", "C"),
  height = c(150, 160, 170),
  sex = c("F", "M", "M")
)

students$height
str(students)
```

## Exercise 4:  Built-in biological dataset

```{r}
data(iris)
head(iris)
```

```{r}
str(iris)
```

# Visualisation
```{r}
hist(iris$Sepal.Length,
main = "Distribution of Sepal Length",
xlab = "Sepal Length (cm)",
col = ("blue")
)
```
